stories.name: Map-First Full-Screen Map
stories.description: Open app → full-screen MapKit map with warm beige style, centered on Chiang Mai (18.7877, 98.9938). Experience markers visible. No tabs, no drawer, no forced onboarding.
stories.acceptance: App launches to full-screen map. Map scrolls/zooms. Location permission requested on first launch.

stories.name: Experience Markers with Distinct Visual States
stories.description: Markers use category-colored circles. States: default (category color), bestNow (gold+glow), completed (semi-transparent+check), favorited (heart badge), upcoming (countdown), footprinted (figure.walk icon).
stories.acceptance: At least 5 seed experiences shown on map. Each has correct category color. Marker tap selects it.

stories.name: Top Filter Bar
stories.description: Horizontal scroll of pill buttons: 'Now' / 'All' / 🛕 / ☕ / 🍜 / 🌅 / 📚. Tap filters map markers in-place. Selected pill filled, others outline. Semi-transparent background.
stories.acceptance: Tap '☕' → only coffee experiences shown. Tap 'All' → all return. Tap 'Now' → time-filtered best-now experiences.

stories.name: Experience Card (Floating Bottom Card)
stories.description: Tap marker → card slides up from bottom: title, category icon, oneLiner, soloScore badge, confidence dot. Swipe down to dismiss. Swipe up → full detail. Haptic on open.
stories.acceptance: Card shows correct data for tapped marker. Dismisses on swipe down. Opens detail on swipe up or tap.

stories.name: Experience Detail View
stories.description: Full scrollable detail: hero section, 'Why It Matters', 'How To' steps (checkable), 'Real Inconveniences' (warning-style), Solo Score breakdown, best times visualization, sources with dates, nearby carousel, action buttons (favorite, mark done).
stories.acceptance: All sections render with correct data. Favorite toggles state. Mark done updates marker on map.

stories.name: Bottom Info Bar
stories.description: Semi-transparent bar above home indicator. Dynamic text: morning/afternoon/evening/night variants. Shows nearby solo traveler count. Animated transitions. Background: .ultraThinMaterial.
stories.acceptance: Text changes based on time of day. Shows '12 solo travelers passed nearby today'. Smooth animation on time transition.

stories.name: Voice Button (Long-Press to Speak)
stories.description: Circular button bottom-right. Long press → record with waveform animation. Release → speech-to-text → AI intent extraction → map re-lights with filtered results. Permission handling.
stories.acceptance: Long press starts recording with animation. Release processes speech. Results filter map markers. Bottom bar updates with AI explanation.

stories.name: GPS Auto-Completion + 30s Voice Feedback
stories.description: Background GPS detects user arrival at experience location. On departure (5+ min after arrival), presents lightweight feedback: 'How was it?' → 30s voice memo → AI structures as feedback.
stories.acceptance: Arrival detected via geofence. Feedback prompt shown on departure. Voice memo captured and processed.

stories.name: User Share New Experience (Long-Press Map)
stories.description: Long press empty area on map → 'Add an experience here?' prompt → 30s voice → AI structures as candidate experience → shown with distinct 'candidate' icon.
stories.acceptance: Long press shows prompt. Voice recording works. New candidate marker appears on map.

stories.name: AI Integration Layer
stories.description: Claude API integration for: (1) location-based experience filtering, (2) voice intent understanding, (3) behavior-based candidate generation, (4) recommendation explanations with source transparency.
stories.acceptance: API call succeeds with valid API key. Recommendations return ranked IDs. Voice intent extracts category/location/time filters. Explanations cite sources.

stories.name: Confidence & Health Display
stories.description: Every experience shows confidence level (L0-L5) with colored dot. Health status: 🟢 healthy / 🟡 fading / 🔴 questioned / ⚫ mayBeGone. Tap for signal counts.
stories.acceptance: Confidence dot visible on markers and cards. Color matches health. Tap reveals signal breakdown.

stories.name: CI/CD with GitHub Actions
stories.description: GitHub Actions workflow: build on push/PR, run unit tests, SwiftLint, archive on main push. Ralph continuous dev loop enabled.
stories.acceptance: CI runs on push. Tests pass. SwiftLint passes. Build succeeds.
